description: A Python reporting script ('sales_report.py') inside the 'sales-cron' container is supposed to run every minute via cron to generate JSON reports in the 'reports/' folder. However, the reports are not being generated. The project is located at '/home/ga/Documents/recurring-report'. Diagnose why the cron job is failing (despite the container running) and fix the configuration so that valid JSON reports automatically appear in the 'reports/' directory every minute. The report must correctly sum the 'amount' for the region specified in docker-compose.yml (NorthAmerica).
